name: Strawberry Crisp
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Sliced Fresh or Frozen Strawberries
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the oatmeal, all-purpose flour, and brown sugar.
2. Add the chopped walnuts to the mixture.
3. Cut in the butter or margarine until the mixture forms a crumbly texture.
4. In another bowl, combine the sliced strawberries and granulated sugar.
5. Grease an 8-inch square pan.
6. Spread half of the crumb mixture evenly on the bottom of the pan.
7. Cover with the strawberry mixture.
8. Spread the remaining crumb mixture over the top layer.
9. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 45 minutes.
10. Serve warm or cold, topped with whipped cream if desired.
